title: Len Cannon Speaks One-on-One With Paxton Lawyer Dan Cogdell
summary: Dan Cogdell discusses the challenges faced in the high-profile case of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton. He shares insights into the courtroom dynamics and the defense approach.

title: Criminal Defense Attorneys Give Their Perspective on Houston Forensic Science Center Issue
summary: Houston attorneys, including Anthony Osso, weigh in on the controversies surrounding the Houston Forensic Science Center. They discuss the implications for ongoing and future cases.

title: Legal Experts Say It's Rare to Pursue Jail Time in Securities Fraud Cases Like Paxton's
summary: Texas legal figures, including Dan Cogdell, explain why jail time is rare in securities fraud cases and provide insights on the legal precedents and implications for Ken Paxton's case.

title: Huge Legal and Political Victory for Ken Paxton
summary: Ken Paxton's acquittal is seen as a significant legal and political win. Dan Cogdell explains the reason for this outcome.

title: Episode 64: Dan Cogdell on a Life in Criminal Defense
summary: Dan Cogdell discusses the beginnings of his legal career and the intricacies of criminal defense law, offering a behind-the-scenes look at the courtroom battles he has fought.

title: A Texas Father Sentenced to 10 Years in Prison for Fatally Shooting His Wife
summary: The article covers the sentencing of a Texas father, with Anthony Osso providing defense. Osso describes his legal strategy and the challenges he faced representing the client.

title: Texas Father Will Be Eligible for Parole in Five Years After Fatally Shooting His Wife
summary: Attorneys Anthony Osso and Dan Cogdell provide insights into the parole eligibility of a Texas father convicted of murder.

title: Former ExxonMobil Executive Cleared of Sexual Assault Charges
summary: Dan Cogdell successfully defended a former ExxonMobil executive against sexual assault charges. The article details the case and its resolution.

title: Texas Attorney Sentenced to 6 Months in Alleged Abortion Attempt of Wife's Baby
summary: A Texas attorney was sentenced for attempting to abort his unborn child. Dan Cogdell's defense efforts are highlighted in this article.

title: Representing a “Cult” Leader: Dan Cogdell on the Waco Trial
summary: Dan Cogdell reflects on his experience defending Branch Davidian member Clive Doyle in concurrence with the premiere of a Showtime series about the trial. He shares his thoughts on the legal and personal challenges of the case.

title: Paxton Trial: Defense Attorneys Provide Statements After Paxton Acquitted on Impeachment Charges
summary: Following Ken Paxton's acquittal, Dan Cogdell and other defense attorneys share their statements and reflections on the trial.

title: Prominent Texas Criminal Defense Attorney Gets the Hollywood Treatment
summary: Dan Cogdell's representation of Branch Davidian cult member Clive Doyle was portrayed in a five-part Showtime series that premiered in 2023. In a Q&A, Cogdell discusses representing Doyle and his strategy for securing an acquittal.
